northwest-weight-wellness-center-everett.sessionDuration: Vitamin IV therapy typically takes between 45 minutes and an hour.
northwest-weight-wellness-center-everett.whatIsIncluded: Customizable blend of vitamins and minerals administered by registered nurses. Menu of vitamin add-ons. Drips include Natural Defense (immune boost), Hydration, and Glutathione. Infusion fully customized to individual needs.
northwest-weight-wellness-center-everett.firstVisitInfo: Wear short sleeves or loose sleeves you can roll up. Drink lots of water before your appointment. Eat a wholesome meal or snack shortly before. You may experience a sensation of coldness or stiffness near the IV, which is normal.

drip-gym-jackson-heights-jackson-heights.sessionDuration: IV treatments typically last between 30 to 60 minutes.
drip-gym-jackson-heights-jackson-heights.whatIsIncluded: Each IV drip delivers 100% bioavailability of vitamins and minerals directly into the bloodstream via saline base plus customized vitamin cocktail. Booster shots available as add-ons. Licensed registered nurse administers all treatments.
specialties: Alpha Lipoic Acid Weight Loss IV
drip-gym-jackson-heights-jackson-heights.priceNote: Single session starts at $250. Gold Membership $220/month (1 drip/month + 15% off). Platinum Membership $415/month (2 drips/month + 25% off).

faces-in-bloom-vancouver.sessionDuration: Your bag of fluids will take approximately 45 minutes to infuse.
faces-in-bloom-vancouver.whatIsIncluded: A customized blend of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants delivered directly into the bloodstream. Cocktail of vitamins customized with your provider. You are seated in a comfortable lounge chair for the duration.
faces-in-bloom-vancouver.firstVisitInfo: Come in comfy, eat a light meal, avoid caffeine and alcohol, bring entertainment. No downtime. New patients receive $50 off their first treatment.
faces-in-bloom-vancouver.frequency: Monthly IV subscription available — members receive one IV each month.
faces-in-bloom-vancouver.priceNote: $160 per infusion. Monthly subscription $160/month includes one IV per month plus exclusive add-on pricing.

pnw-hydration-wellness-puyallup.whatIsIncluded: Each customized IV includes rehydration with 500mL of IV fluids and electrolytes plus vitamins, minerals, and nutrients tailored to individual goals. Shot Bar and booster add-ons available. Mobile services available for an additional fee.
pnw-hydration-wellness-puyallup.frequency: Recommended 1–4 times a month depending on goals and symptoms.
pnw-hydration-wellness-puyallup.priceNote: Pricing not publicly listed. Does not accept insurance.

iv-elements-hoboken.whatIsIncluded: IV drips delivering fluids, vitamins, minerals, and electrolytes directly into the bloodstream. Custom IV mixes. Registered nurses administer all treatments under supervision of a medical doctor and board-certified advanced practice nurse.
iv-elements-hoboken.frequency: Skin Brightening IV recommended 2 times a week or until desired results are achieved.
iv-elements-hoboken.priceNote: Hydroboost $149 at the lounge. Mobile IV service starts at $85 additional. Packages available (must be used within 5 months).

medical-spa-at-pro-club-bellevue.sessionDuration: Approximately 60–90 minutes depending on whether you are a returning or first-time patient. Infusions are tailored to infuse over an hour; venous flow ultimately determines duration.
medical-spa-at-pro-club-bellevue.whatIsIncluded: Proprietary IV infusion blends using 100% certified and sterile ingredients from FDA-registered facilities. Customized for immunity, detox, sports performance, energy, skin rejuvenation, and overall well-being. Vitals checked and infusion options discussed at the start of each appointment.
medical-spa-at-pro-club-bellevue.firstVisitInfo: Arrive well hydrated and having eaten some protein at least one hour prior. Wear layered clothing as body temperature may vary. Bring something to do. Walk-ins welcome; appointments recommended. No membership required.
medical-spa-at-pro-club-bellevue.priceNote: IV infusions range from $155–$1,000. Cash pay clinic — no insurance or co-pays. $100 fee for cancellations less than 24 hours prior. PRO Club members may charge to their membership account.

pure-skiin-spokane-valley.whatIsIncluded: IV fluids and essential nutrients delivered directly into the bloodstream. Customized blend of vitamins, minerals, and hydration tailored to individual goals. Consultation prior to starting to ensure perfect blend.
pure-skiin-spokane-valley.firstVisitInfo: Before starting any IV therapy, PURE SKIIN takes the time to consult with you, ensuring the perfect blend tailored to your specific goals — whether you're looking for an energy boost, immune support, or post-workout recovery.

reviv-new-york-iv-therapy-nad-glutathion.sessionDuration: The entire process takes 30 to 60 minutes.
reviv-new-york-iv-therapy-nad-glutathion.whatIsIncluded: Signature IV drip therapies formulated by board-certified emergency physicians and pharmacists. Vitamins, minerals, and hydration delivered directly into the bloodstream. A $25 consultation fee is required for all IV therapies.
reviv-new-york-iv-therapy-nad-glutathion.firstVisitInfo: Each session begins with a consultation to determine your needs. A licensed nurse gently inserts a cannula into your arm. $25 consultation fee required. Mobile service available — nurses come to your home, hotel, or office.
reviv-new-york-iv-therapy-nad-glutathion.priceNote: Hydromax IV Therapy $119. REVIV Electrolyte Therapy $79. NAD+ 100mg IM Injection $99. $25 consultation fee required for all IV therapies.

symmetria-integrative-medical-marysville.sessionDuration: Sessions typically last 30 minutes to 1 hour. More complex formulations may extend to up to 2 hours. Drip rate and patient comfort also influence duration.
symmetria-integrative-medical-marysville.whatIsIncluded: Customized blend of vitamins, minerals, and nutrients delivered via IV drip, bypassing the digestive system for 100% absorption. Thorough medical history review and assessment before any treatment. Administered by a certified IV therapy nurse.
symmetria-integrative-medical-marysville.firstVisitInfo: A thorough medical history review and assessment are conducted before any treatment to ensure patient safety.
symmetria-integrative-medical-marysville.frequency: General recommended care plan is one treatment every two weeks, unless otherwise directed by a physician.
symmetria-integrative-medical-marysville.priceNote: Specific pricing not listed. Call for more information.

manhattan-iv-therapy-new-york.sessionDuration: Sessions last 30–60 minutes for standard drips; NAD+ sessions last 2–4 hours; Myers' Cocktail completed within 45 minutes.
manhattan-iv-therapy-new-york.whatIsIncluded: IV fluids, vitamins, minerals, and electrolytes delivered directly into the bloodstream. Custom blends per drip — e.g., Migraine IV includes B Complex, Vitamin C, Magnesium, anti-nausea and anti-inflammatory medicine. Healthcare experts tailor each session to your health goals.
manhattan-iv-therapy-new-york.firstVisitInfo: Walk-ins and same-day appointments available. Book online, select date/time/location and IV drip, receive confirmation email.
manhattan-iv-therapy-new-york.frequency: Every 2–4 weeks for optimal results; NAD+ may start weekly tapering to monthly for maintenance.
manhattan-iv-therapy-new-york.priceNote: Inner Beauty IV $280; NAD+ starting at $300; Quench IV $150–$300 depending on customization.

restore-hyper-wellness-kirkland.sessionDuration: IV vitamin/hydration therapy is a relaxing 60–90 minute experience. NAD+ IV sessions are 1–4 hours. Niagen (NR) IV is 30–45 minutes.
restore-hyper-wellness-kirkland.whatIsIncluded: Essential vitamins, minerals, and electrolytes delivered into the bloodstream. Custom blends available with registered nurse — immune-boosting Vitamin C, energy-boosting B Complex, antioxidants like Glutathione, and essential minerals.
restore-hyper-wellness-kirkland.firstVisitInfo: New Client Special: $99 IV Drip at Kirkland location. Administered by Registered Nurses at the studio.
restore-hyper-wellness-kirkland.frequency: Memberships provide monthly IV credits. NAD+ loading dose recommended within 7 days before maintenance doses.
restore-hyper-wellness-kirkland.priceNote: New Client Special $99 IV Drip. Memberships (3-month minimum) unlock 30% off specialty services.

the-regenerative-institute-spokane.whatIsIncluded: Myers IV, Glutathione, Vitamin B and D injections, IV NAD (coenzyme delivered directly into bloodstream), and IV Hydration (electrolytes and nutrients). All administered by infusion nurses.
the-regenerative-institute-spokane.firstVisitInfo: Appointments available Monday–Friday 8:00 AM–4:00 PM. Located at 1303 West Summit Parkway, Lower Level 1, Spokane, WA. Call 509.579.4300.

new-u-womens-clinic-aesthetics-kennewick.sessionDuration: IV therapy sessions usually take 30 to 60 minutes depending on your chosen treatment.
new-u-womens-clinic-aesthetics-kennewick.whatIsIncluded: IV drips customized by double-certified doctor Dr. Fidino. Ingredients vary by drip — Immune Boost includes high-dose Vitamin C, zinc, B-vitamins, and glutathione; Libido/Vitality includes Vitamin C, magnesium, B-complex, B12, taurine, arginine, carnitine, and glutathione.
new-u-womens-clinic-aesthetics-kennewick.firstVisitInfo: $100 OFF your first 4 NAD+ IV infusions. Book at (509) 491-1944.
new-u-womens-clinic-aesthetics-kennewick.priceNote: Pricing not publicly listed. $100 off first 4 NAD+ IV infusions promotion available.

mobile-iv-drip-seattle.sessionDuration: Most IV therapy sessions take between 30 minutes to an hour; most treatments take just 35–45 minutes.
mobile-iv-drip-seattle.whatIsIncluded: Licensed nurse arrives at your home, hotel, or office and administers IV drip including fluids, electrolytes, and vitamins. Administered by registered nurses and paramedics under oversight of a board-certified emergency medicine doctor.
mobile-iv-drip-seattle.firstVisitInfo: Book appointment online at mobileivdrip.com/appointment/. Team comes to your desired location — home, office, hotel, or event space.
mobile-iv-drip-seattle.frequency: Many clients book weekly, others monthly or as needed.
mobile-iv-drip-seattle.priceNote: Pricing not listed publicly. Monthly membership plans available with monthly IVs, exclusive discounts, and priority booking.

intravene-mobile-iv-therapy-seattle.sessionDuration: A typical session lasts 30 to 60 minutes. Most hydration and vitamin drips take 45–60 minutes; NAD+ may require 2–4 hours.
intravene-mobile-iv-therapy-seattle.whatIsIncluded: ER- and ICU-trained Critical Care Nurses come to your location. IV hydration bags customized based on symptoms. Add-ons available including Toradol for pain, Zofran for nausea, or extra Glutathione. HSA/FSA cards accepted.
intravene-mobile-iv-therapy-seattle.firstVisitInfo: Book online or call (206) 887-0651. Operates 8 AM–8 PM with after-hours availability. Serves Seattle and surrounding areas.
intravene-mobile-iv-therapy-seattle.priceNote: Treatments range from $194 to $350. Full pricing transparency provided before appointment begins.

boost-iv-wellness-seattle.whatIsIncluded: Administered by licensed RNs and NPs. Customized blends of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. High-Dose Vitamin C and Iron IV (Venofer) available. Mobile service brings care to home, office, or hotel.
boost-iv-wellness-seattle.firstVisitInfo: Book via boost-iv.com or call 971-533-1700. Mobile service available for individuals and groups.
boost-iv-wellness-seattle.frequency: Memberships available with 3-month minimum. IV credit valid for 60 days.
boost-iv-wellness-seattle.priceNote: IV Cocktail single $215; 5-pack $860 ($172/IV). Hydration Boost ~$175 single; 5-pack $540 ($108/IV). NAD+ 500mg 4-pack $1,600 ($400/IV). High-Dose Vitamin C 25g 5-pack $860.
